title: Ubiquiti Al Pro Enhancer W - External IR enhancer for AI Pro camera, white
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / Cameras accessories / Ilumination
description: IR LED light/illuminator with long-range and FloodLight for the UVC-AI-Pro camera. The integrated radar enhances detection accuracy and allows measuring the distance of people up to 20 m and vehicles up to 35 m. The device also features a built-in speaker , is weather-resistant ( IPX5 ), and has a maximum power consumption of 15 W . Installation is simple, and the illuminator is made from high-quality materials - aluminum alloy and polycarbonate Extends IR range up to 40 m Built-in floodlight with high brightness of 600 lm Integrated radar enhances distance detection accuracy Built-in high-performance speaker Weather-resistant according to IPX5
